Docs.summary: The Speaker Diarization settings. Diarization settings must be specified to enable speaker diarization.

member this.Enabled : Nullable<bool>

Docs.summary: Enable speaker diarization. This is automatically set to true when maxSpeakers is specified.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a hint for the maximum number of speakers for diarization. Must be greater than 1 and less than 36.
